{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/gold_block.png
|block_health=50
|block_resistance=8.5
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
|rotation=stairs
}}


== Obtaining ==
Gold blocks can be crafted from 4 [[Gold Ingot|gold ingots]].

== Usage ==
Gold blocks can be crafted back into 4 [[Gold Ingot|gold ingots]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Metal Blocks]]
